summary: Frontmatter limits/extra_fields.counties omit Queens, King, and New York Counties that appear in the cited evidence block
details: The corridor payload lists limits as "Nassau, Western Suffolk, Eastern Suffolk" and extra_fields.counties as only those three. However, the sole evidence block (meeting_doc_135311#p006_c0009) states: "LIRR Long Island Nassau, Western Suffolk, Eastern Suffolk, Queens, King, and New York Counties." All six counties are part of the same LIRR zone definition in the source. Queens, King (Brooklyn), and New York (Manhattan) are omitted from the structured payload.
suggested_action: Update limits and extra_fields.counties payload to include all six counties from the evidence block: Nassau, Western Suffolk, Eastern Suffolk, Queens, King, and New York Counties, or add a separate corridor record for the NYC borough counties if a different scope boundary is intended.
